title: Color parsing and conversion utilities for UI engine
purpose: Provides functions to parse color strings into RGB objects, convert colors between various formats, and create fill objects for UI rendering.
module_context: Exports several color utility functions including parsing, conversion, and formatting utilities. Uses the culori library for color parsing and formatting.

steps.content: Attempt to parse the input string as a color.
IF parsing fails, return a default black color with full opacity.
Convert the parsed color to RGB format.
Extract and return the RGB components with alpha from the parsed color.
Format the RGB color components as a hexadecimal string.
IF formatting fails, return a default black hex string.
Convert the result to uppercase for consistent formatting.
Generate the full hexadecimal color string for the input color.
Remove the leading hash character from the hex string.

methods.name: colorToRgba255
methods.normalized_params: (color: Color): { r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number }

steps.content: Scale the red component of the color to the 0-255 range.
Scale the green component of the color to the 0-255 range.
Scale the blue component of the color to the 0-255 range.
Return the scaled RGB components along with the alpha value.

methods.name: rgba255ToColor
methods.normalized_params: (rgba: { r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number }): Color

steps.content: Scale the red component from 0-255 range to 0-1 range.
Scale the green component from 0-255 range to 0-1 range.
Scale the blue component from 0-255 range to 0-1 range.
Return the normalized color components with the alpha value.

methods.name: colorToFill
methods.normalized_params: (color: string | Color): { type: 'SOLID'; color: { r: number; g: number; b: number; a: number }; opacity: number; visible: boolean }

steps.content: IF the input is a string, parse it into a color object.
Create a fill object with solid type.
Set the color components and opacity in the fill object.
Mark the fill object as visible.
